rubric_text: In file `ap_ledger.xlsx`, row 13 must contain invoice data for GLFD-0441 with vendor V-00009 (Great Lakes Furniture & Design Co.), invoice date 2026-03-20, received date 2026-03-24, due date 2026-04-19, type Non-PO, amount $7,900.00, GL code 1000-100-6200, and status Open through the 'Status' column
verifier_code:
from pathlib import Path
import openpyxl

def verify(workspace_path, external_services_path=None):
    xlsx_files = list(Path(workspace_path).glob('*.xlsx'))
    if not xlsx_files:
        return {"pass": False, "score": 0.0, "feedback": "No .xlsx file found in workspace"}

    ledger_files = [f for f in xlsx_files if 'ledger' in f.name.lower() or 'ap' in f.name.lower()]
    target_files = ledger_files if ledger_files else xlsx_files

    for fpath in target_files:
        try:
            wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(fpath, data_only=True)
            ws = wb["Invoice Register"] if "Invoice Register" in wb.sheetnames else wb.worksheets[0]

            # Find Status column from header row
            status_col = None
            for col in range(1, ws.max_column + 1):
                hdr = ws.cell(row=1, column=col).value
                if hdr is not None and str(hdr).strip().lower() == "status":
                    status_col = col
                    break

            row_data = [str(cell.value).strip() if cell.value is not None else '' for cell in ws[13]]
            row_str = ' '.join(row_data).lower()

            has_invoice_id = 'glfd-0441' in row_str
            has_vendor_id = 'v-00009' in row_str
            has_vendor_name = 'great lakes furniture & design co' in row_str
            has_invoice_date = '2026-03-20' in row_str
            has_received_date = '2026-03-24' in row_str
            has_due_date = '2026-04-19' in row_str
            has_non_po = 'non-po' in row_str or 'non po' in row_str
            amount_found = '7,900' in row_str or '7900' in row_str
            has_gl = '1000-100-6200' in row_str

            if status_col is not None:
                status_val = ws.cell(row=13, column=status_col).value
                has_open = status_val is not None and str(status_val).strip().lower() == 'open'
            else:
                has_open = 'open' in row_str  # fallback if header not found

            checks = {
                'invoice_id GLFD-0441': has_invoice_id,
                'vendor_id V-00009': has_vendor_id,
                'vendor_name Great Lakes': has_vendor_name,
                'invoice_date 2026-03-20': has_invoice_date,
                'received_date 2026-03-24': has_received_date,
                'due_date 2026-04-19': has_due_date,
                'type Non-PO': has_non_po,
                'amount $7,900.00': amount_found,
                'gl_code 1000-100-6200': has_gl,
                'status Open': has_open
            }

            failed = [k for k, v in checks.items() if not v]
            passed = [k for k, v in checks.items() if v]

            if not failed:
                return {"pass": True, "score": 1.0, "feedback": f"Row 13 in {fpath.name} sheet '{ws.title}' contains all required fields: {', '.join(passed)}"}
        except Exception as e:
            continue

    # Partial feedback pass
    for fpath in target_files:
        try:
            wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(fpath, data_only=True)
            ws = wb["Invoice Register"] if "Invoice Register" in wb.sheetnames else wb.worksheets[0]

            status_col = None
            for col in range(1, ws.max_column + 1):
                hdr = ws.cell(row=1, column=col).value
                if hdr is not None and str(hdr).strip().lower() == "status":
                    status_col = col
                    break

            row_data = [str(cell.value).strip() if cell.value is not None else '' for cell in ws[13]]
            row_str = ' '.join(row_data).lower()

            if status_col is not None:
                status_val = ws.cell(row=13, column=status_col).value
                has_open = status_val is not None and str(status_val).strip().lower() == 'open'
            else:
                has_open = 'open' in row_str

            checks = {
                'invoice_id GLFD-0441': 'glfd-0441' in row_str,
                'vendor_id V-00009': 'v-00009' in row_str,
                'vendor_name Great Lakes': 'great lakes' in row_str,
                'invoice_date 2026-03-20': '2026-03-20' in row_str,
                'received_date 2026-03-24': '2026-03-24' in row_str,
                'due_date 2026-04-19': '2026-04-19' in row_str,
                'type Non-PO': 'non-po' in row_str or 'non po' in row_str,
                'amount $7,900.00': '7,900' in row_str or '7900' in row_str,
                'gl_code 1000-100-6200': '1000-100-6200' in row_str,
                'status Open': has_open
            }
            failed = [k for k, v in checks.items() if not v]
            passed = [k for k, v in checks.items() if v]
            if passed:
                return {"pass": False, "score": len(passed)/len(checks), "feedback": f"Row 13 in {fpath.name} missing: {', '.join(failed)}. Found: {', '.join(passed)}. Row content: {row_data}"}
        except Exception:
            continue

    return {"pass": False, "score": 0.0, "feedback": "Could not find or read ap_ledger.xlsx with valid row 13 data"}

rubric_text: In mailbox.json (Drafts folder), exactly one draft email must exist addressed to m.chen@meridianpartners.com and r.whitfield@meridianpartners.com with CC to ap@meridianpartners.com, subject 'AP APPROVAL REQUIRED: Great Lakes Furniture & Design Co. - $7,900.00 - Invoice GLFD-0441', and body containing only the following information and no other information: 'A non-PO invoice requires your approval before payment can be processed. Vendor: Great Lakes Furniture & Design Co. (V-00009). Invoice: GLFD-0441, dated 2026-03-20. Amount: $7,900.00. Description: Executive conference table, 10-person, walnut finish. GL Code: 1000-100-6200. Please reply APPROVED or REJECTED with reason. If no response is received within 5 business days, the invoice will be placed on APPR hold and the vendor will be notified of the delay.'
In slack_data.json, no new Slack messages must have been sent (the agent must not have sent any Slack messages as part of this task)
No fields are populated after the "Status" column in Row 13 of `ap_ledger.xlsx`.
In `mailbox.json`,no more than one email must exist in the Drafts folder, and no emails related to Great Lakes Furniture & Design or invoice GLFD-0441 must exist in the Sent folder.
In `ap_ledger.xlsx`, the Invoice Register must contain no more than 13 rows of data (header row plus 12 invoice entries, including the new GLFD-0441 entry in row 13).
In `vendor_master.xlsx`, no new vendor rows must have been added (the file must contain no more than 12 rows: 1 header row and 11 vendor rows).
